Also can't install in IWD? Update 24-07-25: Now it does install? @_@

conflicts.reason: Functionality provided by Trap Overhaul (per II install notes)
Functionality provided by Trap Overhaul - Manually Added (per II install notes)

ki.description: Trap Overhaul's ADD_SPLSTATE function loops 0-255 searching for a free SPLSTATE.IDS slot. In megainstalls with 250+ existing splstates (dw_talents adds ~67, stratagems ~50+, SubtleD_Spell_Tweaks ~19, etc.), all 256 vanilla slots are full. The loop runs to completion without finding a free slot — each iteration reloads the whole SPLSTATE.IDS file via FILE_CONTAINS_EVALUATED, producing stdout silence but filling WSETUP.DEBUG with thousands of '[./override/SPLSTATE.IDS] loaded, NNNN bytes' lines. Observed in session 6693001a (2026-04-16): Trap Overhaul component 0.21 (Monk Evasion, Fast Detection, Recovery) stalled for 52 minutes before user abort, WSETUP.DEBUG grew to 39.5 MB of these lines.
ki.workaround: Apply Infinity Mod Runner's Trap Overhaul splstate-512 patch (manifest #55, marker _eetmr_splstate_512_v2). The patch extends the ADD_SPLSTATE search loop AND break sentinel from 256 → 512, giving enough headroom since EE engines support splstate indices >255 (stratagems already uses 256-315 successfully).
ki.source: Session references extracted from description on 2026-04-21 during Phase 2.3 validator rollout: session 6693001a

sum: Overhauls the trap system with 15 components: smarter trap placement, new trap types, and rebalanced trap damage and detection.
